reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: 知ることの可能性と限界を同時に扱う。確実性と不確実性の dialectic

falsifiability: Gettier 問題が完全解消され「正当化された真なる信念」が知識と同値であることが証明されれば core 仮説が刷新

description.ja: 知識の本性・正当化・限界を問う哲学分野。Plato Theaetetus 以来の中心問題
description.en: Branch of philosophy concerned with the nature, justification, and limits of knowledge.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 知識は信念・真理・正当化の交点であり、疑いの根号によって常に揺らぐ。

visualGlyph.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><defs><polygon points='0 0, 10 3, 0 6' fill='#00d4ff'/></defs><circle cx='50' cy='30' r='8' fill='#7c3aed' opacity='0.8'/><circle cx='30' cy='65' r='8' fill='#00ff88' opacity='0.8'/><circle cx='70' cy='65' r='8' fill='#ec4899' opacity='0.8'/><path d='M 50 38 L 32 60' stroke='#00d4ff' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none' marker-end='url(#arrowhead)'/><path d='M 50 38 L 68 60' stroke='#00d4ff' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none' marker-end='url(#arrowhead)'/><path d='M 30 73 L 70 73' stroke='#f59e0b' stroke-width='1.5' fill='none' stroke-dasharray='3,2'/><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='12' fill='none' stroke='#ffd700' stroke-width='1' opacity='0.6'/><path d='M 50 38 Q 45 50 50 62' stroke='#ec4899' stroke-width='0.8' fill='none' opacity='0.5'/><text x='50' y='28' font-size='8' fill='#00d4ff' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>Truth</text><text x='22' y='70' font-size='8' fill='#00ff88' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>Just.</text><text x='78' y='70' font-size='8' fill='#ec4899' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>Belief</text><text x='50' y='95' font-size='7' fill='#f59e0b' text-anchor='middle'>Doubt ← Oscillation →</text></svg>
visualGlyph.interpretation: 三角形の頂点（真理・正当化・信念）を結ぶ知識の金環、その中心を揺らす疑いの力。
